questionHtml:
Which reaction represents the neutralization of a Brønsted–Lowry acid and base?


A.  2HCl (aq) + Zn (s) → ZnCl2 (aq) + H2 (g)

B.  2HCl (aq) + ZnO (s) → ZnCl2 (aq) + H2O (l)

C.  4NH3 (g) + 5O2 (g) → 4NO (g) + 6H2O (l)

D.  C2H4 (g) + H2 (g) → C2H6 (g)
